svg.text: AI Gateway — Engineering Problem Timeline
Non-obvious bugs found and fixed when building a self-hosted multi-AI routing gateway
1 — SSH Auth: allowUnsafeSshCommand blocked by default
simple-git 3.x silently blocks GIT_SSH_COMMAND unless unsafe: { allowUnsafeSshCommand: true }
is passed to the constructor. Setting via .env() is not enough — check happens at options level.
Fix: add unsafe option to both working git instance and the clone instance
2 — Parser: stop words extracted as repo names
"did you pull the chess thing" → parser extracted "the" as the repo target, tried
to clone a repo called "the". No validation against known repos in REPOS env.
Fix: validate matched name against getKnownRepos() — only accept real repo keys
3 — Gemini CLI silent hang on agentic mode
Gemini detects repo context → calls shell tools (run_shell_command, list_directory)
→ tools fail silently in subprocess → no stdout → process hangs until 5-min timeout.
Not a network issue. Not a prompt issue. Gemini's own agentic trigger path.
Fix: --yolo auto-approves tool calls + prompt as direct -p arg (not stdin)
4 — GEMINI_CLI_TRUST_WORKSPACE not reaching subprocess
Env var set in .env and loaded by dotenv. But SPAWN_ENV() builds its own env
object for child_process.spawn — spread of process.env without the dotenv key.
Gemini refused to operate in non-approved working directories.
Fix: hardcode GEMINI_CLI_TRUST_WORKSPACE: 'true' directly in SPAWN_ENV()
5 — Clone race condition: "not a git repository"
Pull + auto-log-fetch trigger two concurrent ensureCloned calls on uncached repo.
Second caller removes partial dir, starts second clone — first clone breaks.
Both fail: "not a git repository". Timing-dependent — only triggers on first access.
Fix: cloneLocks[name] promise — second caller awaits first, returns on .git check
6 — AI context: no actual git data in prompt
After pull, user asks "what was the last commit?" — AI has no commit data.
Gemini tries to run git itself (subprocess fails). Claude hallucinates or declines.
Pull result string ≠ actual commit history.
Fix: auto-fetch git log after every op, inject as gitContext block before AI prompt
7 — Git phrases contaminating AI prompt
"pull chess and tell me the last commit" → full message sent to Gemini → Gemini interprets "pull chess" as a git instruction → tries to run it in subprocess.
Produces either a hang (agentic) or an error, not a useful answer about commits.
Fix: introduce aiPrompt field — original text with git op phrases stripped. AI receives only the question. Git ops handled by gateway before AI is called.
All 7 bugs fixed. All 3 AI engines (Claude, Gemini CLI, Codex) work reliably with git integration, streaming output, and persistent memory.
Source: masternazz/ai-gateway · Node.js · simple-git · child_process.spawn · Telegram Bot API · imapflow
